title: Ways to provide feedback: Health Canada Accessibility Plan - Canada.ca
content:
## Ways to provide feedback
There are various way you can submit your feedback. If you want to  submit anonymous feedback, please use our online form.
We will acknowledge all accessibility feedback we receive, except feedback that is sent anonymously.
E-mail: art-epa@hc-sc.gc.ca Telephone:  1-833-725-2751 Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)
Health Canada accessibility feedback 70 Columbine Dr; Brooke Claxton building Address Locator 0907D Ottawa, Ontario, K1A 0K9
